descriptionOverride: Check if Teleca is open. Returns current Sydney time, day, and isBusinessHours (true = 8:30am-4:45pm Mon-Fri Sydney time). Call this BEFORE your greeting at the start of every call. Determines whether telecaWarmTransfer is available. Do not tell the caller the time unless they ask.

Text the caller a link to browse available 1300 or 1800 numbers plus a walkthrough video showing how to sign up. Use when the caller is interested in getting a 1300 or 1800 number. Pass number_type as "1300" or "1800" based on what the caller wants. Always ask permission before sending.

Transfer a caller to Teleca staff via conference bridge. Staff hears a prompt and presses 1 to accept. Only use when the caller explicitly asks to speak to someone AND telecaBusinessHours returned isBusinessHours: true. Returns connected: true (caller is with staff, you are done) or connected: false (follow the Teleca transfer fallback cascade in your prompt).

Text the caller a Teleca YouTube walkthrough video link via SMS. Use when the caller asks how to do something self-service in the portal. Pass the video title - the server fuzzy-matches it to the right URL. Always ask permission before sending.
